{{Quote|So, you're seeking excitement and horror. Well, you've come to the right place!|Horville|<ref name="HHoH" />}}
'''Horville''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] individual who ran [[Horville's Hut of Horrors]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Horville's establishment was visited by a group of [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], who were searching for something more exciting than the [[Tumble Bunny|Tumble Bunnies]] show. Horville was able to convince them to come inside to see the show, after which they all ran out, screaming, as it had been a very frightening affair. The [[Youngling/Legends|young]] Ewoks continued crying about Horville's horrors that afternoon, and Horville continued to scare one of the Ewoks, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]], who had [[Dream/Legends|nightmares]] that [[Standard day/Legends|night]].

==Biography==
===A scary hut===
{{Quote|I'm Horville and this is my Hut of Horrors.|Horville|<ref name="HHoH" />}}
[[File:HelloHorville.jpg|thumb|left|265px|Horville presents his Hut of Horrors.]]
Horville was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] individual who ran an attraction known as [[Horville's Hut of Horrors]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] before<ref name="HHoH" /> [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{EwoksDate|the appearance of Horville|[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]]}}</ref> the hut was visited by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Widdle Warrick/Legends|Willy]] and [[Weechee Warrick]], the former of whom was frightened to the extent of having trouble [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] for a [[Standard week/Legends|week]].<ref name="HHoH" /> In 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> Horville brought the Hut of Horrors to a [[Bright Tree Fête|carnival]] in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].<ref name="HHoH" />

During the [[Circus/Legends|carnival]], Horville's business was visited by the [[Youngling/Legends|young]] Ewoks [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], who had been tasked with bringing their [[Wokling/Legends|wokling]] siblings to see the [[Tumble Bunny]] show. After being fed up with the show being boring, they went to the hut in search of something more fun. Horville stepped outside to welcome them, which startled Warrick and caused the rest of the Ewoks to scream. Horville then commended them for choosing the attraction, calling it the right place for one seeking excitement and horror, and also gave a self introduction and introduced the hut.<ref name="HHoH" />

===Too scary for woklings===
{{Quote|Step up, brave Ewoks, and see what's inside.|Horville|<ref name="HHoH" />}}
Horville beckoned the Ewoks to step up even as Kintaka tried to get Warrick to go back to the Tumble Bunnies. Horville introduced the exhibitions, which included [[Garth (snake eater)|Garth]] the [[Snake/Legends|snake]] [[Diet/Legends|eater]], the hideous [[Ploob]], and [[Bilbob]] the Mystic, all of whom caused the woklings to scream in terror. Warrick held a vote to decide whether the group would visit the Hut of Horrors or the Tumble Bunnies. Despite the vote choosing the bunnies, Warrick proclaimed that the hut had won, personally guaranteeing that the woklings would enjoy themselves. Horville showed them the way in as eerie [[Music/Legends|music]] played and chortled as the Ewoks went inside.<ref name="HHoH" />

[[File:Horville1.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Horville waves goodbye.]]
They later ran out, screaming as Horville waved goodbye. Horville asked them to tell their friends about the Hut of Horrors despite their clear displeasure with it. Kintaka had been correct to be skeptical of Warrick's idea, as Horville's show thorougly scared the wokling; they all cried in fright for the rest of the afternoon. That night, all of the woklings had [[Dream/Legends|nightmares]] related to Horville's horrors, but they did not experience them, as a [[Dream sucking device|device]] created by the [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] sucked the dreams away. However, the [[Magic/Legends|magic]] device fell over, and all of the dreams instead went to Warrick. In his dream, he was being chased by Horville, who rode a [[Color/Legends|pink]] [[Species/Legends|animal]], telling the animal to get the young Ewok. Eventually, he was indeed captured by Horville, after which Warrick woke up.<ref name="HHoH" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Goodbye, Ewok. Tell all your friends about Horville's Hut of Horrors.|Horville|<ref name="HHoH" />}}
A member of a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Limb/Legends|bipedal]] species, Horville had no qualms with sending young woklings into the scary hut; indeed calling them brave and beckoning them closer. Horville payed no attention to the Ewoks' screams after they visited the show, instead asking them to continue to advertise the attraction. The alien had white [[Hair/Legends|hair]], black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and gray skin. Horville's feet were three-toed, and the alien's hands had four fingers.<ref name="HHoH" />

==Equipment==
Horville wore red [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]].<ref name="HHoH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Horville first appeared in "[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]],"<ref name="HHoH" /> the sixteenth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], which was written by [[Paul Dini]] and premiered on [[November 15]], [[1986]].<ref name="Insider 27">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>
